__flat__.adminPlanGrantAlreadyActive: The same plan is already active for this user.
__flat__.adminPlanGrantProviderManagedConflict: The user already has a higher-tier active plan. A lower-tier plan cannot be granted. Please wait until the current plan expires before trying again.
__flat__.adminPlanGrantRoleUnsupported: Only creator or operator users can receive manual credit or package grants.
__flat__.creditInsufficient: Insufficient credits. Purchase a topup or subscription before continuing.
__flat__.customDomainDisabled: Custom domains are not enabled for this creator.
__flat__.domainBindingNotFound: The requested custom domain binding was not found.
__flat__.domainHostConflict: This custom domain is already bound by another creator.
__flat__.subscriptionInactive: An active subscription is required. Top-up credits can only be purchased or used within the subscription period.
__flat__.subscriptionUpgradeOnly: The current subscription is still active. Only upgrades to a higher-tier plan are allowed.
